title: Build and Print a Full Name
prompt_md:
## Goal
Write a program that reads a first name and a last name on separate lines and prints the full name along with its character count.

## Input
- Line 1: a first name (one word, no spaces).
- Line 2: a last name (one word, no spaces).

## Output
Print exactly two lines:
```
Full name: <first> <last>
Characters: <N>
```
where `<N>` is the total number of characters in `<first> <last>` (including the space between them).

Example: for input `Alice` / `Smith`, print:
```
Full name: Alice Smith
Characters: 11
```

## Requirements
1. Read first name and last name using `std::cin >>`.
2. Build the full name by concatenating: `first + " " + last`.
3. Use `.length()` or `.size()` to count the characters.
4. Print the two lines with the exact labels shown.
5. Edge case: input `Bo` / `Li` should print `Full name: Bo Li` and `Characters: 5`.

title: Fix the Greeting Builder
prompt_md:
## Goal
The program below is supposed to read a name from the user and print a personalized greeting with the name's character count. It compiles and runs but produces wrong output. Find and fix the one logic bug.

## Input
- Line 1: a name (one word, no spaces).

## Output
Print exactly two lines:
```
Hello, <name>!
Your name has <N> characters.
```
where `<N>` is the number of characters in `<name>` only (not including the greeting prefix or suffix).

Example: for input `Ada`, print:
```
Hello, Ada!
Your name has 3 characters.
```

## Requirements
1. The greeting line must be exactly `Hello, <name>!`.
2. The count line must report the length of the name, not the full greeting string.
3. The bug is in how the character count is computed — fix it without changing the output format or variable names.

test_cases.label: Sample: Ada
test_cases.expected_stdout:
Hello, Ada!
Your name has 3 characters.

test_cases.label: Hidden: single character name
test_cases.expected_stdout:
Hello, J!
Your name has 1 characters.

test_cases.label: Hidden: longer name
test_cases.expected_stdout:
Hello, Christopher!
Your name has 11 characters.
